title: latest_height() network failure mapped to Db error, not Connect
description: In payment.rs:160, client.latest_height().await.map_err(SendPaymentError::Db) maps a lightwalletd network failure to the Db variant, not Connect. Trigger: lightwalletd unreachable during send_payment. Bad behavior: error Display shows 'database error: ...' for a network failure; the Connect arm in dispatch_payment's error handler is never hit, so the user gets a misleading message and the fallthrough Unknown action is sent to the payee with 'payment error: database error: ...' instead of a more specific message.
close_reason: Fixed: latest_height() now maps to SendPaymentError::Connect. Test latest_height_network_failure_propagates_as_connect added and passing.
